name: Rose Marie
description: American actress, singer, comedian, and vaudeville performer (1923–2017)
abstract: Rose Marie Guy (née Mazzetta; August 15, 1923 – December 28, 2017), known professionally as Rose Marie, was an American actress, singer, comedienne, and vaudeville performer with a career spanning nine decades, which included film, radio, records, theater, night clubs and television. As a child performer from the late 1920s onward, she h…

about_quotes.speaker: Dan D'Imperio
about_quotes.evidence: they ended up playing the Hippodrome Theater in New York City with Baby Rose Marie... And she was on the bill as well in the Hippodrome Theater.
